---
name: Documentation Request
about: Request improvements or clarifications in the documentation
title: "[DOC] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Documentation to update

Specific file or section (e.g. `README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `docs/...`).

## Current problem

What is incomplete, outdated, or confusing.

## Proposed improvement

What should be added or changed:

- [ ] Explanations or clarifications
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Step-by-step guides
- [ ] Other:

## Additional context

External references or relevant details.
